story.text: Mock-vs-real as an auditable runtime admission that screams every turn until resolved (mock-shame) is above the baseline naming-convention hygiene for test doubles. Protect it.

_note: A foreign review's finding, returned to package 'qa-metabolism' and landed as proposed work through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0057). The value gate judges the story; bdo's confirm-arc on 'epic.qa-metabolism-response' queues the whole review at once. Never mutated — the fold over .ai-native/log/ is the live state (D-5).
